questions.question: What is the main difference between Iterative Deepening Depth-First Search (ID DFS) and Breadth-First Search (BFS) algorithms?
questions.hint: Compare the traversal strategies used in both algorithms

questions.question: Write a pseudocode for Iterative Deepening Depth-First Search (ID DFS) algorithm. Assume the graph is represented as an adjacency list.
questions.hint: Use a loop to control the depth of search

questions.question: Describe the trade-offs between using Iterative Deepening Depth-First Search (ID DFS) and Breadth-First Search (BFS) algorithms for solving mazes. Which algorithm is more suitable for solving larger mazes?
questions.hint: Consider the complexity of the maze and the computational resources available
